settings.tagline: Velvet softness. Statement hardware. Zero compromise.

settings.title: About This Collar
settings.value_3: Rose gold / Gold / Silver — varies by colourway
settings.value_4: Secure clip buckle (no traditional belt holes)
settings.value_5: Not suitable for dogs that pull — use with a harness

settings.title: Neck Size Guide
settings.hint: Measure at the base of the neck. Add 2cm for comfort.
settings.table_html:
SizeNeckFits breed
XS20–28cmChihuahua, Pom, Cat
S28–36cmShih Tzu, Maltese, Small cat
M36–44cmCavoodle, French Bulldog
L44–52cmLabrador, Border Collie
XL52–60cmLarge breeds

settings.title: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Free worldwide shipping on all orders. Express available at checkout.

Free 30-day returns on all non-personalised items. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.

settings.title: Care Instructions
settings.content: Spot clean only. Do not machine wash — velvet pile will mat. Use a soft, damp cloth on surface marks. Brush pile gently with a velvet brush to restore after storage.

settings.name: Plush Velvet
settings.description: Soft pile exterior that feels as good as it looks. Gentle against sensitive skin and delicate coats.

settings.name: Statement Hardware
settings.description: Rose-gold or gold-finish clip buckle and D-ring. Matches the colourway — chosen for each, not one-size.

settings.name: Multiple Colourways
settings.description: Midnight Navy to Dusty Rose to Forest Green — each designed to coordinate beautifully with your pet's coat.

settings.text: I've never seen my dog get this excited. The quality feels incredible — super durable and looks beautiful. It's rare to find pet products that are both functional and this stylish. PAWD nailed it.
settings.author: Olivia M.

settings.text: The personalised collar is the prettiest I've ever seen. The stitching, the softness, the engraving — all of it feels so intentional. Worth every cent and more.
settings.author: Jack L.
